title: Our Apps
name: Auto Route
subtitle: Explore HK by bus with an AI companion
description: Auto Route is an AI-powered bus route planner that helps you explore Hong Kong with ease. Simply tell Auto Route where you want to go, and it will generate the best bus routes for you. Whether you're a local or a tourist, Auto Route makes navigating Hong Kong's extensive bus network simple and efficient.

features.title: Ask in plain English:
bulletpoints: "Routes from Central to Tsim Sha Tsui" and Auto Route will find the matching routes.
"Bus 9" and Auto Route will find all the matchines by the Kowloon Motor Bus, Citybus and Green Mini Buses.

features.title: Helps you navigate around Hong Kong:
bulletpoints: See the nearest stops around you, so you will never feel lost.
Save your favourite locations such as your work, hotel or home, to easily find a route back.
Routes are organised by day, operating hours, and direction, giving you a simple view on route availability.

features.title: Designed with privacy and reliability:
bulletpoints: All data is stored within the App, no internet is required, navigate around Hong Kong without worrying about slow internet access or low data.
AI is completely on the device, your requests are never shared to a third party.
Darkmode helps conserve your battery, letting you explore Hong Kong for longer.
All this in a tiny 60MB package, saving you space for more photos

ctamessage: Download Auto Route now and start exploring HK like a local — offline, private, and with AI by your side!
